sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24651" key="diagrapte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαγραπ-τέον</orth>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διαγράφω</foreign> IV) <sense id="n24651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must strike out, erase,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">368</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
